zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Baldington於1443年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿德波利時，她的父親Thomas Baldington49歲，母親Agnes Danvers38歲。她於大約1449年與Sir Geoffrey Gates在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1487年在英國享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Baldington于1443年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾阿德波利时，她的父亲Thomas Baldington49岁，母亲Agnes Danvers38岁。她于大约1449年与Sir Geoffrey Gates在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1487年在英国享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baldington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Baldington was born in 1443, in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Baldington, was 49 and her mother, Agnes Danvers, was 38. She married Sir Geoffrey Gates about 1449, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1487, in England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Baldington est née en 1443, à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Baldington, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Agnes Danvers, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Geoffrey Gates environ 1449, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1487, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Baldington 1443 in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Baldington 49 und ihre Mutter Agnes Danvers 38. Sie hat um 1449 in England Sir Geoffrey Gates geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1487 im Alter von 44 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Baldington è nata il nel 1443 nel Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Baldington, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Agnes Danvers, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Geoffrey Gates circa 1449, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1487, nel England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Baldingtonが1443年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Baldingtonは49歳，母Agnes Danversは38歳であった。約1449年にイギリスでSir Geoffrey Gatesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1487年にイギリスで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Baldington(이)가 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 애더버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Baldington(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Danvers(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1449년 영국에서 Sir Geoffrey Gates(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1487년 영국에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Adderbury, Oxford, England: Adderbury, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Baldington nasceu em 1443, em Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Baldington, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Danvers, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Geoffrey Gates aproximadamente 1449, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1487, em Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Baldington родилась в 1443 г. в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Baldington было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Danvers, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Geoffrey Gates около 1449 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1487 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Baldington nació en 1443, en Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Baldington, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Agnes Danvers, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Geoffrey Gates aproximadamente 1449, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1487, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
